DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF QUALOGY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE AN ANSWER WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF THE ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER, to comply with CRC 3.1312.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
